source: ShellWard Security Team — aggregated from NVD, GitHub Advisories, security research

vulnerabilities.description_zh: 远程代码执行：恶意仓库通过 Hooks 和 MCP Server 在信任提示前执行任意命令 (CVSS 8.7)
vulnerabilities.description_en: RCE via Hooks and MCP Server bypass — arbitrary shell execution before trust dialog (CVSS 8.7)

vulnerabilities.description_zh: API 密钥泄露：恶意仓库通过 settings.json 设置 ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL 窃取用户 API Key (CVSS 5.3)
vulnerabilities.description_en: API key exfiltration via ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL in settings.json before trust prompt (CVSS 5.3)

vulnerabilities.description_zh: 命令注入：通过目录切换绕过文件写入保护
vulnerabilities.description_en: Command injection via directory change bypasses write protection

vulnerabilities.description_zh: 命令注入：通过管道 sed 命令绕过文件写入限制
vulnerabilities.description_en: Command injection via piped sed command bypasses file write restrictions

vulnerabilities.description_zh: 沙箱逃逸：通过 settings.json 持久化配置注入
vulnerabilities.description_en: Sandbox escape via persistent configuration injection in settings.json

vulnerabilities.description_zh: 命令注入：find 命令绕过用户审批提示
vulnerabilities.description_en: Command injection in find command bypasses user approval prompt

vulnerabilities.description_zh: 路径绕过：通过 ZSH clobber 实现任意文件写入
vulnerabilities.description_en: Path restriction bypass via ZSH clobber allows arbitrary file writes

vulnerabilities.description_zh: 域名验证绕过：自动向攻击者控制的域名发送请求
vulnerabilities.description_en: Domain validation bypass allows automatic requests to attacker-controlled domains

vulnerabilities.description_zh: 命令验证绕过：允许执行任意代码
vulnerabilities.description_en: Command validation bypass allows arbitrary code execution

vulnerabilities.description_zh: 信任提示前执行命令：启动时即执行恶意代码
vulnerabilities.description_en: Command execution prior to startup trust dialog

vulnerabilities.description_zh: sed 命令验证绕过：实现任意文件写入
vulnerabilities.description_en: Sed command validation bypass allows arbitrary file writes

vulnerabilities.description_zh: 特定 Yarn 版本下插件自动加载导致任意代码执行
vulnerabilities.description_en: Arbitrary code execution via plugin autoloading with specific Yarn versions

vulnerabilities.description_zh: 恶意 git email 配置导致任意代码执行
vulnerabilities.description_en: Arbitrary code execution caused by maliciously configured git email

vulnerabilities.description_zh: rg 命令注入绕过用户审批提示
vulnerabilities.description_en: Command injection in rg command bypassed user approval prompt

vulnerabilities.description_zh: 默认允许列表过于宽松：未授权文件读取和网络外泄
vulnerabilities.description_en: Permissive default allowlist enables unauthorized file read and network exfiltration

vulnerabilities.description_zh: echo 命令注入绕过用户审批提示
vulnerabilities.description_en: Command injection in echo command bypassed user approval prompt

vulnerabilities.description_zh: IDE 扩展 WebSocket 接受任意来源连接
vulnerabilities.description_en: IDE extensions allow websocket connections from arbitrary origins

supplyChainAlerts.description_zh: SANDWORM_MODE 供应链攻击：19 个恶意 npm 包伪装为 Claude Code 等 AI 工具，植入恶意 MCP Server 窃取 SSH 密钥和凭证
supplyChainAlerts.description_en: SANDWORM_MODE supply chain attack: 19 malicious npm packages impersonating Claude Code and AI tools, deploying rogue MCP servers to exfiltrate SSH keys and credentials
